records.title: Mask Background Noise and Sleep Through the Night with 25 Sounds
records.description: 25 sounds including white, pink, and brown noise — this machine gives light sleepers a proper sound barrier. Plus a night light for those middle-of-the-night wake-ups.

records.title: Block Out Noise and Finally Stay Asleep: Colour Noise Sound Machine
records.description: If every creak and car outside pulls you out of sleep, a consistent sound layer makes a real difference. 25 options means you find the one that works for you.

records.title: Light Sleeper Tips: Use a Sound Machine to Stay Asleep Longer
records.description: A sound machine doesn't just cover noise — it gives your brain something neutral to tune to. Choose from 25 colours and sounds to find what quiets the house.

records.title: Wind Down at Night with Colour Noise and a Gentle Night Light
records.description: Anxious minds often need more than silence to switch off. This sound machine pairs 25 calming sounds with a soft night light — something neutral to focus on at bedtime.

records.title: A Sound Machine and Night Light for Anxious Bedtime Routines
records.description: Brown noise, pink noise, or a steady hum — 25 sounds to find what settles your mind. The warm night light helps signal to your brain that it's time to sleep.

records.title: How to Sleep Better: Colour Noise Machine with Night Light
records.description: A how to sleep better uk approach that actually works — pair colour noise with a soft night light and let your mind stop scanning for sounds in the dark.

records.title: Fall Back Asleep Faster with Colour Noise and Night Light
records.description: Wake up in the night? A steady sound layer and a warm night light can help you settle back down without fully waking. 25 sounds to suit any preference.

records.title: Stop Lying Awake in the Night: Sound Machine with Night Light
records.description: If middle-of-the-night waking is your pattern, a sound machine and night light works better than lying in silence. 25 sounds to help you find your reset.

records.title: 25-Sound Machine with Night Light for Restless, Wakeful Nights
records.description: A gentle night light and a wall of calm sound — this machine gives restless sleepers something to settle back into, rather than lying wide awake in quiet.
